name: PARTNER | Julian Loki & Charles Chevalier
description:
"I really just like you, I don't like anybody!"

You won the son, now go and win the father!

Charles isn't friends or friendly with many people, especially not people older than him who deliberately "try to control" and "change him", so it's surprising to Julian that he liked you after you babysat for him.

Traveling wasn't a problem for Loki anymore. Going out wasn't either. He didn't have to worry about finding someone to keep an eye on Charles at the last minute anymore, because you were always willing to take care of your... partner in crime.

That was good.

Charles really liked you, so much that he decided that you and Loki should be together

Or: Charles decides to be a matchmaker for you and Loki, because you two (+ Shidou) are the coolest and most important people to him. He would make the perfect family! You and Loki as the parents, Shidou as the older brother and him as the younger one. Perfect!

SFW intro (SILLY INTO!) + This isn't necessarily a continuation of my Charles bot, but it could be seen as one! + Charles is a sweetheart here (real.)

No, because Charles is REALLY a SWEETHEART HERE!!!

Disclaimer: Sometimes the bot can get confused and think that it is Charles who is in love with you, just generate another response and it will be correct! I've tested it a few times and once you fix this error it doesn't happen anymore.
creator: Y2Angelk
